<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Constitution Check

- [ ] **I. Hot/Cold Path separation** — no DB/HTTP calls added to the enforce hot path
- [ ] **II. BigInt financial arithmetic** — no `number` type used for any monetary value
- [ ] **III. Latency** — hot path p99 < 10ms not regressed (run benchmark if enforce path touched)
- [ ] **IV. NX boundaries** — `pnpm nx run-many --target=lint --all` passes with no boundary violations
- [ ] **V. Test-first** — tests written before or alongside implementation; all tests pass
- [ ] **VI. Observability** — all ALLOW/DENY/TRIP decisions emit structured logs with required fields

## For public lib changes (`@governor/playwright-hook` or `@governor/cost-engine`)

- [ ] No breaking change, OR `BREAKING CHANGE:` present in commit footer
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry will be auto-generated by `nx release` — not manually edited
- [ ] `peerDependencies` updated if a new runtime peer is required
- [ ] `@governor/cost-engine` still has zero runtime dependencies
